content.json:
## Wirken audit overview

Eight-detection overview against the Wirken audit DCRs. Each tile reads from `Custom_WirkenAudit_CL` (legacy) or `Custom_WirkenSession_CL` (typed).

content.query:
Custom_WirkenSession_CL
| where Kind == 'assistant_tool_calls'
| mv-expand call = parse_json(Event).calls
| where tostring(call.name) == 'exec'
| extend cmd = tostring(parse_json(tostring(call.arguments)).command)
| where cmd matches regex @'(?i)^(/[^ ]+/)?(curl|wget|msiexec|invoke-webrequest|iwr|bitsadmin|certutil)\b'
| summarize count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
content.title: Detection 1: shell outbound fetch (count by 5m)

content.query:
let calls = Custom_WirkenSession_CL | where Kind == 'assistant_tool_calls' | mv-expand call = parse_json(Event).calls | where tostring(call.name) == 'exec' | project CallTime = TimeGenerated, SessionId, CallId = tostring(call.id);
let results = Custom_WirkenSession_CL | where Kind == 'tool_result' | extend body = parse_json(Event) | where tostring(body.tool_name) == 'exec' | project ResultTime = TimeGenerated, SessionId, CallId = tostring(body.call_id);
calls
| join kind=inner results on SessionId, CallId
| extend DurationMs = datetime_diff('millisecond', ResultTime, CallTime)
| where DurationMs > 30000
| summarize count() by bin(ResultTime, 15m)
content.title: Detection 2: long-running exec (>30s, count by 15m)

content.query:
Custom_WirkenSession_CL
| where Kind == 'assistant_tool_calls'
| mv-expand call = parse_json(Event).calls
| where tostring(call.name) == 'write_file'
| extend path = tostring(parse_json(tostring(call.arguments)).path)
| where path matches regex @'(?i)\.(exe|dll|so|dylib|msi|scr|bat|ps1|sh|cmd|com|vbs|jar)$'
| summarize count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
content.title: Detection 3: binary write (count by 15m)

content.query:
let prefixes = _GetWatchlist('wirken_skill_dirs') | project prefix;
Custom_WirkenSession_CL
| where Kind == 'assistant_tool_calls'
| mv-expand call = parse_json(Event).calls
| where tostring(call.name) == 'exec'
| extend Argv = tostring(parse_json(tostring(call.arguments)).command)
| extend MatchedPrefix = tostring(toscalar(prefixes | where Argv contains tostring(prefix) | take 1 | project prefix))
| where isnotempty(MatchedPrefix)
| summarize count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
content.title: Detection 4: skill-dir exec (count by 15m)

content.query:
Custom_WirkenAudit_CL
| where Action == 'audit.chain_broken'
| summarize count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
content.title: Detection 5: chain-broken events (count by 5m)

content.query:
Custom_WirkenSession_CL
| where Kind == 'mcp_entry_refused'
| extend body = parse_json(Event)
| summarize count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m), tostring(body.reason)
content.title: Detection 6: MCP entry refused (count by reason, 15m)

content.query:
Custom_WirkenSession_CL
| where Kind == 'hook_dispatched'
| extend body = parse_json(Event)
| extend decision_kind = tostring(body.decision.kind)
| where decision_kind in ('deny', 'timeout')
| summarize count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m), decision_kind
content.title: Detection 7: veto hook deny or timeout (15m)

content.query:
Custom_WirkenSession_CL
| where Kind == 'tool_output_redacted'
| summarize count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
content.title: Detection 8: tool output redacted (15m)
